creator: oz@nixil.net
text:
Close this bug please.. I used the patches here plus some other changes
for the upgrade and opened up a clean report. (PR 122323)


Btw, sorry for the extended delay for this upgrade.  This bug was
misplaced forever, until I happened to look at the open bug report page
a while back.  Since then, it's been a hit/miss with available time, and
trying to figure out how to integrate the themes.  The Qdvdauthor
upgrade to 1.1.0 pushed me to finish this as 0.8.0 is expected.

     -Phil.
